publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:06:59 UTC.

ead.archdesc:
======= RMA00980Cornell University Department of Art records15-00-980Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections2B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:10:43 UTC. >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Department of Art records
Cornell University. Department of Art
15-00-980
7 cubic feet. 7 cubic feet.
1936-1971 2072145
Scope and content
Correspondence and subject files of the Cornell University Department of Art.
Preferred Citation
Cornell University. Department of Art. Records, #15-00-980. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Boxes 4-5 are restricted to permission of the University Archivist.
Art -- Study and teaching.
2072145 <<<<<<< HEAD Subject files1947-1971
Arrangement
Arranged alphabetically.
Scope and Contents
Subject files related to department business. Included are correspondence, meeting materials, job descriptions and inquiries, and files on curriculum and visiting artists.Accounts, Dept. of Art1959-196011Accounts1961-196212Accounts - (Art Dept.)1962-196313Accounts1963-196414Accounts1964-196515Accounts1965-196716Activities1964-196517Addison Gallery - Bartlett Hayes195418Addison Gallery - Student Show1949-195019Admissions1957-1959549

Scope and Contents
Originally labelled as correspondence, this series is composed of files on department faculty.
Arrangement
Series arranged in alphabetical order by faculty surname. Faculty files preceded by general correspondence files.General Correspondence1949-195141

Scope and Contents
Originally labelled as correspondence, this series is composed of files on department faculty.
Arrangement
Series arranged in alphabetical order by faculty surname. Faculty files preceded by general correspondence files.General Correspondence1949-195141
